zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Osborne於1563年3月4日出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Sir Edward Osborne25歲，母親Lady Anne Hewett20歲。她於1578年6月6日與Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1625年1月29日在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Osborne于1563年3月4日出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Sir Edward Osborne25岁，母亲Lady Anne Hewett20岁。她于1578年6月6日与Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham在英国英格兰倫敦聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1625年1月29日在英国坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Osborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

variants.name: Oborne
meanings: habitational name from Oborne in Dorset. The placename derives from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.
possibly from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

variants.name: Hoskin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osekin with prosthetic H-, a pet form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Os- (particularly Osbert, as well as Osbern, and Osmund) + the Flemish diminutive suffix -kin. All three personal names were current in medieval Cornwall or Devon; see Osborne , Osmond , and Opie (a pet form of Osbert). Old English Ōsbeorn, Ōsbeohrt, and Ōsmund may also have contributed in a minor way to Middle English usage; Middle English Oswald is another possible source, but the name was very rare in the late 14th century. For the excrescent initial H-, compare Herrick .

variants.name: Oborn
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name chiefly from Oborne in Dorset, or perhaps occasionally from Howbourne Farm in Hadlow Down, Sussex, Woburn in Bedfordshire, Woburn Park in Surrey, or Wooburn in Buckinghamshire. The placenames derive from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, except Wooburn in Buckinghamshire, which is of uncertain etymology.
English (of Norman origin): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Osborne was born on 4 March 1563, in London, England, her father, Sir Edward Osborne, was 25 and her mother, Lady Anne Hewett, was 20. She married Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham on 6 June 1578, in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 29 January 1625, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Osborne est née le 4 mars 1563, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Osborne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Hewett, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham le 6 juin 1578, à St Dionis Backchurch, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 janvier 1625, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Osborne am 4. März 1563 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Osborne 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Hewett 20. Sie hat am 6. Juni 1578 in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Januar 1625 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Osborne è nata il il 4 marzo 1563 nel London, England, sua padre, Sir Edward Osborne, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Hewett, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham il 6 giugno 1578, nel St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 29 gennaio 1625, nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Osborneが1563年3月4日にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Osborneは25歳，母Lady Anne Hewettは20歳であった。1578年6月6日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ディオニス バクチャーチでSir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Islehamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1625年1月29日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.St Dionis Backchurch, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치
ko.Saint Dionis Backchurch, London, Middles: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치
ko.St. Martins, Ogars, London, England: 영국 워윅실르 비밍함 스트 마틴 인 테 불 링 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Osborne(이)가 1563년 3월 4일 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Osborne(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Hewett(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1578년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치에서 Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 1월 29일 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.4 March 1563–29 January 1625: 4 de março de 1563–29 de janeiro de 1625

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Osborne nasceu em 4 de março de 1563, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Osborne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Hewett, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham em 6 de junho de 1578, em St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1625, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Martins, Ogars, London, England: ст мартинь ин т булл ринг чурч, бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Osborne родилась 4 марта 1563 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Osborne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Hewett, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham 6 июня 1578 г. в местности ст дионис баккчурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 29 января 1625 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Osborne nació el 4 de marzo de 1563, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Osborne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Hewett, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham el 6 de junio de 1578, en St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 29 de enero de 1625, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
